meaning: 哥达瓦里河[印度中部](注入孟加拉湾)
examples: He occupied the Panara and Kona kingdoms of the Godavari delta.
In Andhra Pradesh, West Godavari district produces the best tobacco in the northern lights soils.
The Krishna Godavari basin contains oil as well as gas that could help to reduce energy-starved India’s gigantic import bill.
The British giant has been working with Reliance since 2008 on a deepwater block in the Krishna Godavari basin that they co-own.
With gas output from the much-hyped Krishna-Godavari basin, located on its eastern coast, not meeting expectations, it will be forced to import more.
